section_data.title: MeauxChess
section_data.body: Real-time 3D multiplayer with private rooms, Resend email invites, and live board sync on Cloudflare Durable Objects.

section_data.title: MeauxGame Engine
section_data.body: Premium glass-and-amber pieces, SparkChess-style legal-move illumination, and a locked cinematic camera — built for the browser.

section_data.title: Agent Sam
section_data.body: Practice anytime on the full board. Agent Sam is your orange opponent — capture rails, timers, and a clean SparkChess-style HUD.

section_data.title: London Dream Railway
section_data.body: A bright voxel train-table world where little red trains and Tube-inspired carriages weave through London landmarks.
section_data.card_body: Three.js toy-table city with rails, switches, camera tours, landmarks, tunnels, and smooth train loops.
section_data.footer_note: Playable flagship demo: city table, landmarks, train paths, branch switches, camera tours, instanced props, and optimized WebGL rendering.
